Operation 'scanWebsite' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Scan a website' is too generic and doesn't convey the security-focused nature of the operation. The description lacks clarity on input requirements (domain parameter), output structure (ScanResult), and rate-limiting behavior. Enhanced summary specifies HTTP security headers analysis. Improved description clarifies: (1) what inputs are expected (domain parameter), (2) what is returned (ScanResult object with grades/findings), (3) rate-limiting constraints (60-second window), (4) automatic rescan behavior (24-hour threshold), and (5) the actionable nature of results. This enables AI agents to better understand when to invoke this operation and how to handle responses and rate limits.

data.current_description: Initiates a scan of a domain for HTTP security headers and best practices. A site can only be scanned and return a new result every 60 seconds. If previous scan data is older than 24 hours, a rescan is automatically initiated.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate HTTP security headers scan for domain
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a comprehensive scan of a domain to analyze HTTP security headers and best practices compliance. The operation evaluates security configurations and returns a ScanResult object containing security grades and findings. Rate limiting: new scan results are available only once per 60 seconds per domain. Automatic rescans: if cached scan data exceeds 24 hours, a new scan is automatically triggered. Requires a valid domain parameter. Returns detailed security analysis including header evaluation and actionable recommendations.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Scan a website' is too generic and doesn't convey the security-focused nature of the operation. The description lacks clarity on input requirements (domain parameter), output structure (ScanResult), and rate-limiting behavior. Enhanced summary specifies HTTP security headers analysis. Improved description clarifies: (1) what inputs are expected (domain parameter), (2) what is returned (ScanResult object with grades/findings), (3) rate-limiting constraints (60-second window), (4) automatic rescan behavior (24-hour threshold), and (5) the actionable nature of results. This enables AI agents to better understand when to invoke this operation and how to handle responses and rate limits.
